Ryan's Restaurant
Home About Contact

Savannah, Georgia

Our Story

A table worth gathering around — where Southern tradition is refined with care, seasonality, and the quiet confidence of true hospitality.

Since 2011

Honest, elevated Southern cooking

Ryan Callahan opened Ryan's Restaurant in 2011 after training under James Beard-nominated chefs in Charleston and New Orleans. His vision was simple: bring honest, elevated Southern cooking to the heart of Savannah's historic district.

Since then, the restaurant has grown into a beloved gathering place for celebratory dinners, intimate evenings, and unforgettable meals shaped by the rhythms of the Lowcountry and the best of Georgia's seasonal harvest.

Meet the Team

The people behind the experience

Ryan Callahan

Chef / Owner

Ryan leads the kitchen with a devotion to seasonality, balance, and the soul of Southern cuisine.

Dani Osei

Executive Sous Chef

Dani brings precision, creativity, and an instinct for vibrant flavor to every menu detail.

Marcus Webb

Front of House Manager

Marcus ensures every guest feels warmly welcomed, graciously guided, and perfectly cared for.

Our Philosophy

Thoughtful ingredients, made from scratch daily

Farm-to-table sourcing

We partner with local Georgia farms to bring the freshest produce, herbs, and heirloom ingredients to the table.

Sustainable seafood

Our seafood selections are guided by responsible sourcing and a commitment to coastal stewardship.

Scratch kitchen every day

Stocks, sauces, desserts, and breads are prepared in-house for depth, consistency, and unmistakable character.

Awards & Recognition

A proud record of excellence

2022–2024

Best Fine Dining 2023

Georgia Trend

Top Restaurant

Savannah Favorite

Celebrated for hospitality and refined Southern cuisine

Plan Your Visit

Join us for a meal rooted in place, craft, and hospitality

Whether you're celebrating something special or simply craving a memorable evening in Savannah, Ryan's Restaurant welcomes you to a table with warmth and intention.
